      >
        <path
          d="M19.5559 9.04541C15.657 9.04541 12.485 12.2164 12.485 16.1136C12.485 20.0109 15.657 23.1819 19.5559 23.1819C23.458 23.1819 26.6327 20.0109 26.6327 16.1136C26.6327 12.2164 23.458 9.04541 19.5559 9.04541ZM19.5559 18.9665C17.9814 18.9665 16.7006 17.6867 16.7006 16.1136C16.7006 14.5406 17.9814 13.261 19.5559 13.261C21.1336 13.261 22.4173 14.5408 22.4173 16.1138C22.4173 17.6869 21.1336 18.9665 19.5559 18.9665Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M81.3825 9.04541H62.6906C58.7916 9.04541 55.6196 12.2164 55.6196 16.1136C55.6196 20.0109 58.7916 23.1819 62.6906 23.1819H81.3825C85.2814 23.1819 88.4534 20.0109 88.4534 16.1136C88.4534 12.2164 85.2814 9.04541 81.3825 9.04541ZM81.3825 18.9665H62.6906C61.1161 18.9665 59.8352 17.6867 59.8352 16.1136C59.8352 14.5406 61.1163 13.2608 62.6906 13.2608H81.3825C82.957 13.2608 84.2378 14.5406 84.2378 16.1136C84.2378 17.6867 82.957 18.9665 81.3825 18.9665Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M37.8806 9.04541C33.9817 9.04541 30.8097 12.2164 30.8097 16.1136C30.8097 20.0109 33.9817 23.1819 37.8806 23.1819C41.7827 23.1819 44.9574 20.0109 44.9574 16.1136C44.9574 12.2164 41.7827 9.04541 37.8806 9.04541ZM37.8806 18.9665C36.3061 18.9665 35.0253 17.6867 35.0253 16.1136C35.0253 14.5406 36.3063 13.2608 37.8806 13.2608C39.4583 13.2608 40.742 14.5406 40.742 16.1136C40.742 17.6867 39.4583 18.9665 37.8806 18.9665Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M34.4438 43.9866C33.312 43.7155 32.1744 44.4143 31.9039 45.5467L27.7224 63.0449C27.4519 64.1771 28.1502 65.3144 29.2824 65.5848C29.4471 65.6241 29.6121 65.6432 29.7743 65.6432C30.7271 65.6432 31.5912 64.9923 31.8224 64.0248L36.0039 46.5265C36.2746 45.3943 35.5761 44.2573 34.4438 43.9866Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M42.1821 63.5284C42.5839 63.8862 43.0847 64.0622 43.5834 64.0622C44.1638 64.0622 44.7417 63.8239 45.1583 63.3563L51.0688 56.7214C52.044 55.6358 52.044 53.9357 51.0748 52.8569L45.1581 46.2151C44.3835 45.3456 43.051 45.2691 42.1821 46.0431C41.3126 46.8175 41.2357 48.1499 42.0101 49.019L47.147 54.7855L42.0101 60.5522C41.2359 61.4217 41.3128 62.7542 42.1821 63.5284Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M21.5443 46.0435C20.6748 45.2691 19.3428 45.3467 18.5684 46.2155L12.6585 52.8499C11.682 53.9357 11.682 55.6366 12.6518 56.7149L18.5686 63.3568C18.9852 63.8245 19.5629 64.0626 20.1435 64.0626C20.6422 64.0626 21.1432 63.8866 21.5447 63.5288C22.4142 62.7544 22.4912 61.4219 21.7168 60.5529L16.5798 54.7864L21.7168 49.0197C22.4907 48.1502 22.4138 46.8177 21.5443 46.0435Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M102.289 68.4595H101.507C101.097 67.1319 100.566 65.8502 99.918 64.6254L100.477 64.065C101.368 63.1786 101.861 61.995 101.862 60.7321C101.864 59.4663 101.374 58.2779 100.481 7.50652 6.81427 4.2156 9.89012 4.2156H89.5026C92.5785 4.2156 95.1772 7.50652 95.1772 11.4015V27.8576L4.2156 27.8574ZM102.799 76.9959C102.799 77.2636 102.561 77.4984 102.289 77.4984H99.8789C98.8961 77.4984 98.0438 78.1774 97.8243 79.1354C97.3691 81.122 96.5872 83.0061 95.5001 84.7357C94.9765 85.5686 95.0988 86.653 95.7948 87.3483L97.5004 89.0528C97.6278 89.1803 97.6467 89.3325 97.6467 89.4119C97.6465 89.5068 97.6218 89.6446 97.4987 89.7666L94.8057 92.4644C94.678 92.5919 94.5257 92.6111 94.4454 92.6111C94.4452 92.6111 94.445 92.6111 94.445 92.6111C94.3493 92.6111 94.2111 92.5862 94.0876 92.4619L92.3757 90.7571C91.6795 90.0639 90.5973 89.9437 89.766 90.4662C88.0339 91.5558 86.1419 92.339 84.1423 92.794C83.1831 93.0126 82.5023 93.8654 82.5023 94.8494V97.2763C82.5023 97.5472 82.2668 97.785 81.9984 97.785H78.1783C77.9097 97.785 77.6741 97.5474 77.6741 97.2763V94.8434C77.6741 93.8585 76.9919 93.0047 76.0313 92.7875C74.0572 92.341 72.1685 91.5591 70.4182 90.4639C70.0733 90.248 69.6858 90.1426 69.3006 90.1426C68.7561 90.1426 68.2165 90.3531 67.8099 90.7599L66.1046 92.4644C65.9769 92.5919 65.8245 92.6111 65.7443 92.6111C65.744 92.6111 65.7438 92.6111 65.7436 92.6111C65.6481 92.6111 65.5097 92.5862 65.3887 92.4646L62.6881 89.7652C62.4989 89.5762 62.501 89.2414 62.6855 89.0558L64.3972 87.3511C65.0965 86.6546 65.2188 85.5665 64.6919 84.7321C63.6031 83.0082 62.8201 81.1254 62.3645 79.136C62.145 78.1781 61.2927 77.4988 60.3097 77.4988H57.8872C57.614 77.4988 57.3831 77.2686 57.3831 76.9963V73.1782C57.3831 72.9059 57.614 72.6756 57.8872 72.6756H60.3036C61.2875 72.6756 62.1406 71.9948 62.3591 71.0356C62.8089 69.059 63.5818 67.1839 64.6563 65.4621C65.1751 64.6308 65.0526 63.5517 64.3606 62.8578L62.6362 61.1284C62.5192 61.0122 62.4945           fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M80.0914 62.2139C72.9887 62.2139 67.2103 67.9898 67.2103 75.0893C67.2103 82.1856 72.9887 87.9589 80.0914 87.9589C87.191 87.9589 92.9667 82.1858 92.9667 75.0893C92.9667 67.99 87.191 62.2139 80.0914 62.2139ZM80.0914 83.7433C75.3134 83.7433 71.4259 79.8611 71.4259 75.0893C71.4259 70.3142 75.3134 66.4295 80.0914 66.4295C84.8664 66.4295 88.7511 70.3142 88.7511 75.0893C88.7511 79.8611 84.8661 83.7433 80.0914 83.7433Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
        <path
          d="M31.656 77.4985H31.6146C30.4506 77.4985 29.5069 78.4422 29.5069 79.6062C29.5069 80.7702 30.4506 81.7139 31.6146 81.7139H31.656C32.82 81.7139 33.7637 80.7702 33.7637 79.6062C33.7637 78.4422 32.82 77.4985 31.656 77.4985Z"
          fill="currentColor"
        />
      </svg>
    ),
  },
];

const ArrowIcon = () => (
  <svg
    width="24"
    height="16"
    viewBox="0 0 24 16"
    fill="none"
    stroke="currentColor"
    strokeWidth="1.5"
    className="text-gray-400"
  >
    <line x1="0" y1="8" x2="20" y2="8" />
    <polyline points="14,3 20,8 14,13" />
  </svg>
);

export default function ProjectSteps() {
  const sectionRef = useRef(null);
  const [activeStep, setActiveStep] = useState(1);

  // Split data
  const topRow = steps.slice(0, 3);
  const bottomRow = steps.slice(3, 5);

  // Scroll logic
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleScroll = () => {
      if (!sectionRef.current) return;

      const rect = sectionRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
      const height = sectionRef.current.offsetHeight - window.innerHeight;

      const progress = Math.min(Math.max((-rect.top / height) * 100, 0), 100);

      if (progress < 10) setActiveStep(1);
      else if (progress < 25) setActiveStep(2);
      else if (progress < 45) setActiveStep(3);
      else if (progress < 70) setActiveStep(4);
      else setActiveStep(5);
    };

    window.addEventListener("scroll", handleScroll);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", handleScroll);
  }, []);

  const isActive = (id) => activeStep >= id;

  return (
    <section
      ref={sectionRef}
      className="relative h-[500vh] mx-auto bg-cover bg-center bg-no-repeat"
      style={{
        backgroundImage: "url('/images/Processbg.png')",
      }}
    >
      <div className="sticky top-0 h-screen flex flex-col gap-12 justify-center items-center px-8">
        {/* Heading */}
        <h2 className="text-center text-[48px] font-bold text-gray-900 max-w-2xl mx-auto  leading-snug">
          Managing our projects and establishing deadlines
        </h2>

        {/* helper function usage */}
        {(() => {
          const isActive = (id) => activeStep >= id;

          return (
            <>
              {/* Top Row */}
              <div className="flex items-stretch gap-7 mb-7 max-w-[1440px]">
                {topRow.map((step, i) => (
                  <div key={step.id} className="flex items-center flex-1">
                    <div
                      className={`
                    relative flex-1 border-[4px] p-6 text-center transition-all duration-500
                    ${isActive(step.id) ? "border-[#2CB6C0]" : "border-[#E5E5E5]"}
                  `}
                    >
                      {/* Number */}
                      <span
                        className={`
                      absolute top-4 right-4 text-[42px] font-bold transition-all duration-500
                      ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-[#2CB6C0]" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                    `}
                      >
                        {step.id}
                      </span>

                      {/* Icon */}
                      <div
                        className={`
                      mb-5 flex justify-center transition-all duration-500
                      ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-[#2CB6C0]" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                    `}
                      >
                        {step.icon}
                      </div>

                      {/* Title */}
                      <h3
                        className={`
                      text-[32px] font-semibold mb-3 transition-all duration-500
                      ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-black" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                    `}
                      >
                        {step.title}
                      </h3>

                      {/* Description */}
                      {step.desc && (
                        <p
                          className={`
                        text-sm leading-relaxed transition-all duration-500
                        ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-black" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                      `}
                        >
                          {step.desc}
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {i < topRow.length - 1 && (
                      <div className="w-7 flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                        <ArrowIcon />
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Bottom Row */}
              <div className="flex justify-center items-stretch gap-7 max-w-[1440px]">
                {bottomRow.map((step, i) => (
                  <div key={step.id} className="flex-1 max-w-[420px]">
                    <div
                      className={`
                    relative border-[4px] p-6 text-center transition-all duration-500
                    ${isActive(step.id) ? "border-[#2CB6C0]" : "border-[#E5E5E5]"}
                  `}
                    >
                      {/* Number */}
                      <span
                        className={`
                      absolute top-4 right-4 text-[42px] font-bold transition-all duration-500
                      ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-[#2CB6C0]" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                    `}
                      >
                        {step.id}
                      </span>

                      {/* Icon */}
                      <div
                        className={`
                      mb-5 flex justify-center transition-all duration-500
                      ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-[#2CB6C0]" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                    `}
                      >
                        {step.icon}
                      </div>

                      {/* Title */}
                      <h3
                        className={`
                      text-[32px] font-semibold mb-3 transition-all duration-500
                      ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-black" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                    `}
                      >
                        {step.title}
                      </h3>

                      {/* Description */}
                      {step.desc && (
                        <p
                          className={`
                        text-sm leading-relaxed transition-all duration-500
                        ${isActive(step.id) ? "text-black" : "text-[#E5E5E5]"}
                      `}
                        >
                          {step.desc}
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {i < bottomRow.length - 1 && (
                      <div className="w-7 flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                        <ArrowIcon />
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </>
          );
        })()}
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}
